description: You are a high school economics teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing a lesson on the "power of compounding." Create a worksheet in the Sugar Write activity comparing simple and compound interest growth. The document must include a 'Formulas' section showing the formulas for Simple Interest (A = P(1 + rt)) and Compound Interest (A = P(1 + r)^t), a data table showing year-by-year balances for a $1,000 principal at a 5% annual rate over 5 years (with columns for Year, Simple Interest Balance, and Compound Interest Balance), and an 'Analysis' section explaining why compound interest yields more money over time. Save the completed document as an ODT file to /home/ga/Documents/investment_growth.odt.
